researched_category.notes: WhatsApp Business Platform is Meta's enterprise-grade API for programmatic messaging, calling, and business communication on WhatsApp.

one_liner.value: Enterprise API for businesses to programmatically send/receive WhatsApp messages, manage templates, handle media, and build conversational experiences at scale.
one_liner.notes: The platform covers Cloud API (messaging/calling/groups), Business Management API, and Marketing Messages API.

methods.notes: Primary method is System User access tokens (long-lived bearer tokens). OAuth2 (User access tokens) also supported but short-lived. Docs state 'Authentication uses OAuth (not 2.0) access tokens' but mechanism is Bearer token in Authorization header.

access.notes: Developers can self-serve sign up with a Facebook/Meta account for free. Testing with free sandbox/test numbers is free. For production messaging, business verification (documents) and a payment method for per-message charges are required. No admin/partner approval needed for direct developers using own data.

summary.value: Comprehensive REST API (via graph.facebook.com) covering messaging (text, media, interactive, templates), calling, groups, media upload/download, business profile management, phone number management, template lifecycle, analytics, flows, webhooks, and more. Official documentation includes SDKs, sample apps, and OpenAPI specs.
summary.notes: Multiple sub-APIs: Cloud API, Business Management API, Marketing Messages API. Webhooks for event-driven messaging.

agent_interface.notes: Multiple community MCP servers exist. The most notable is tkhattar14/whatsapp-business-mcp (50+ tools, uses official Meta API) and msaelices/whatsapp-mcp-server (uses GreenAPI). No official MCP server from Meta. Also available on Composio.

rationale.value: WhatsApp Business Platform has a well-documented public REST API (Graph API), clear bearer-token auth via System User access tokens, self-serve free tier for testing, and multiple community MCP servers already exist. The only production requirement is business verification and payment method, but testing/development is free and accessible. An agent toolkit can be built today using the official Cloud API.
rationale.notes: Developers can sign up at developers.facebook.com, create a Meta app, generate a System User access token, and start sending test messages within minutes using the free sandbox. Per-message pricing applies for production.

s1.quote: WhatsApp Business Platform — Drive revenue growth, boost efficiency, and deliver exceptional customer experiences with the WhatsApp Business Platform—our enterprise-grade APIs for messaging and calling.
s1.title: WhatsApp Business Platform Overview

s2.quote: The WhatsApp Business Platform enables businesses to communicate with customers at scale. The WhatsApp Business Platform Cloud API enables you to programmatically message and call on WhatsApp.
s2.title: About the WhatsApp Business Platform

s3.quote: If you are a direct developer, meaning only you or your business accesses your own data, use a System User access token... When making API requests, include your token in an authorization request header, preceded by Bearer.
s3.title: Access Tokens Guide

s4.quote: Authentication uses OAuth (not 2.0) access tokens, while permissions restrict access to specific resources.
s4.title: About the WhatsApp Business Platform

s5.quote: Prerequisites: Facebook account or managed Meta account; Developer registration... Free access to test numbers, code samples, webhooks, a sandbox and more.
s5.title: WhatsApp Cloud API Get Started

s6.quote: Get started quickly and test for free. Free access to test numbers, code samples, webhooks, a sandbox and more.
s6.title: Developer Hub

s7.quote: Effective July 1, 2025, Meta charges on a per-message basis... You are only charged when a template message is delivered.
s7.title: Pricing on the WhatsApp Business Platform

s8.quote: Base URL: https://graph.facebook.com. API for managing WhatsApp Business Account details and configuration.
s8.title: WhatsApp Business Account API

s9.quote: Business apps are automatically approved for Standard Access for all Permissions and Features... If you are using the API for yourself as a Direct Developer, you do not need Advanced access or app review.
s9.title: App Review

s10.quote: A security-hardened Model Context Protocol (MCP) server for the official WhatsApp Business Cloud API. 50+ tools across 8 modules — messaging, templates, media, analytics, flows, webhooks, business profile, account management.
s10.title: tkhattar14/whatsapp-business-mcp

s11.quote: A server that provides a Model Context Protocol (MCP) interface to interact with WhatsApp Business API using FastMCP.
s11.title: msaelices/whatsapp-mcp-server

limitations: Could not fetch onboarding/overview page due to timeout; got cookie-wall page instead.
The official docs say 'Authentication uses OAuth (not 2.0)' which is ambiguous but the practical mechanism is Bearer token.
Some community MCP servers (e.g., msaelices/whatsapp-mcp-server) use third-party GreenAPI rather than the official Meta API directly.
